allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$url = 'https://github.com/rojo-rbx/rojo/releases/download/v7.6.1/rojo-7.6.1-windows-x86_64.zip'
\\$dest = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\jacob\\\\.local\\\\bin'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\$dest | Out-Null
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \\$url -OutFile 'C:\\\\Users\\\\jacob\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Temp\\\\rojo.zip'
Expand-Archive -Path 'C:\\\\Users\\\\jacob\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Temp\\\\rojo.zip' -DestinationPath \\$dest -Force
Write-Host 'Rojo installed to' \\$dest
Get-ChildItem \\$dest
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 34872 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { \\$proc = Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \\$proc.Name \\$proc.Id }" 2>&1)
